semanticChecks.message: build_book_label() should return the Book label from the subclass override.
Keep the success message print after the assertion passes.
build_sample_labels() should return labels from a mixed Book/Game list in order.
build_empty_title_label() should prove the empty title is sanitized before labeling.
Print the sanitized label for the game.
